full_text:
Gao Dai (Kongwen) 高岱 (孔文)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Gao Dai (高岱), styledKongwen (孔文), was born in Wu. Took his lord to Xu Zhao for protection. Later executed by Sun Ce for contempt. Gao Dai was affiliated with Shang Xian.
